summary: Cathy O'Neil announces her participation on the Program Committee for Bloomberg's Data For Good Exchange, a one-day event preceding the Strata NY conference. The event features speakers including Jake Porway and includes a competition for papers that contribute to the public good. As a committee member, she will review and rate submitted papers. She expresses enthusiasm about the quality of submissions she's seen so far.
key_points: Bloomberg is hosting a Data For Good Exchange event on September 28th
The event leads into O'Reilly's annual Strata NY conference
A paper competition focuses on research contributing to the public good
O'Neil's role involves reviewing and rating submitted papers
money_quotes: I'm happy to announce that I'm on the Program Committee for Bloomberg's Data For Good Exchange.
There's a competition for papers that contribute to the public good.
I've taken a quick look at the papers and they look pretty amazing.
key_insight: Data science communities are organizing around applying their skills for public benefit through events like the Data For Good Exchange.
